# Support

Need help with Stremio Plus? Here's how to get it:

## Documentation

Check the [README](../README.md) for setup instructions, feature overview, and build steps.

## GitHub Issues

Found a bug or want to request a feature? Open an [issue](https://github.com/Fxy6969/stremio-plus/issues).

## Community Discussions

Use [Discussions](https://github.com/Fxy6969/stremio-plus/discussions) for:
- General questions
- Ideas and feedback
- Community help

## Discord

Join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/jRBkd47x9E) for real-time help.

## Security Issues

Report security vulnerabilities directly via Discord DM rather than opening a public issue.
